name: Venn — Precision Medicine Overlap (4 domains)
input: Create a 4-circle Venn diagram for precision medicine: Genomics (WGS, WES, SNP arrays), Proteomics (mass spectrometry, protein biomarkers), Clinical Data (EHR, imaging, pathology), and Patient Preferences (lifestyle, values, shared decision-making). The central overlap is Precision Treatment Selection.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Genomics, Proteomics, Clinical Data, Patient Preferences)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Four overlapping circles in distinct colors, center labeled Precision Treatment Selection.

data.title: Precision Medicine Integration

items.label: Genomics
items.description: Whole genome/exome sequencing and SNP array analysis for genetic variants

items.label: Proteomics
items.description: Mass spectrometry profiling and protein biomarker identification

items.label: Clinical Data
items.description: Electronic health records, medical imaging, and pathology reports

items.label: Patient Preferences
items.description: Lifestyle factors, personal values, and shared decision-making input

data.caption: Four intersecting domains converging on precision treatment selection
